title: Notification appointing The Adjudicating Authority and Notification specifying the New Delhi Bench
description: Notification appointing The Adjudicating Authority and Notification specifying the New Delhi Bench
text: NOTIFICATION APPOINTING THE ADJUDICATING AUTHORITYI In exercise 'of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 6 of the Prevention of Money-laundering Act, 2002 (15 of 2U03), the Central Government hereby appoints an Adjudicating Authority to exercise iurisdiciion, p()wers and authority conferred fnj or under the said Act. The Adjudia; 'ing Authority shall consist of a Chairperson and two Members and ehall function within the Department of Revenue, Millistry of Finance of the Central Government with Headquarters at New Delhi.
